sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28329" key="dra/petis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρᾱ´πετ-ις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δραπέτης</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
